name: TNS Poison — Remote Registration Hijacking
description: Oracle Database allows remote attackers to hijack a TNS listener by registering a rogue database instance via unprotected remote registration.

name: Oracle DB Java VM RCE
description: A critical vulnerability in the Oracle Database Java VM component allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

name: Oracle DB JDBC/OCI Network Takeover
description: A vulnerability in Oracle Database JDBC and OCI drivers allows man-in-the-middle attackers to take over network connections.

name: Oracle DB Information Disclosure
description: An easily exploitable information disclosure vulnerability in Oracle Database allows unauthenticated access to sensitive data.

name: Oracle DB Java VM Privilege Escalation
description: A vulnerability in the Java VM component allows a low-privileged authenticated user to escalate privileges within the database.

name: Oracle DB Java VM Partial DoS
description: A vulnerability in the Java VM component allows an authenticated attacker to cause partial denial of service.

name: Oracle RDBMS Security Bypass
description: A vulnerability in the Oracle RDBMS security component allows an authenticated attacker to bypass certain security restrictions.

name: Oracle Data Pump Information Disclosure
description: A vulnerability in the Data Pump component allows an authenticated attacker to access or export sensitive data.

name: Oracle RDBMS Vulnerability
description: An easily exploitable vulnerability in the Oracle RDBMS allows an unauthenticated attacker to compromise the database server.

name: Oracle XML Parser XXE
description: The Oracle Database XML Parser component is vulnerable to XML External Entity injection, allowing file read and SSRF.

name: Oracle DB Java VM File Read
description: A vulnerability in the Java VM component allows an authenticated attacker to read arbitrary files on the database server.

name: Oracle Core RDBMS XSS
description: A cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Oracle Core RDBMS component allows injection of malicious scripts.

name: Oracle Data Pump RCE
description: A vulnerability in Oracle Data Pump allows a high-privileged attacker to execute arbitrary code on the database server.

name: Oracle RDBMS Privilege Escalation
description: A vulnerability in Oracle RDBMS allows a local attacker to escalate privileges from the database user to operating system level.

name: Oracle Core RDBMS Vulnerability
description: A vulnerability in the Core RDBMS component allows a high-privileged attacker to compromise the Oracle Database.

name: Oracle RDBMS Buffer Overflow
description: A buffer overflow vulnerability in Oracle Database RDBMS Security component allows authenticated remote code execution.

name: Oracle RDBMS Partial DoS
description: A vulnerability in Oracle RDBMS allows authenticated users to cause partial denial of service via the Sharding component.

name: Oracle DB Security DoS
description: A vulnerability in the Oracle Database Server Security component allows a high-privileged attacker to cause denial of service.

name: Oracle DB Core RDBMS Info Disclosure
description: A vulnerability in Oracle Core RDBMS allows an authenticated attacker to access unauthorized data.

name: Oracle DB Java VM Vulnerability
description: A vulnerability in the Java VM component of Oracle Database allows an authenticated attacker to cause partial denial of service.
